name: visible-pollutants
title: Pollution: Impactful Smog / Spore Cloud
author: somethingtohide
description:
Pollution appears as a visible smog (or spore) cloud, covering your factory. The more you pollute, the less you can see.

Optionally reduce solar power effectiveness based on how much pollution is over each panel, to promote placing panels far away from heavily polluted areas.
